# WARP — Wavefoundry

Thin pointer. Read `AGENTS.md` first for the full agent operating surface.

## Startup Order

1. `AGENTS.md` — shortcuts, stage gate, git commits policy
2. `docs/prompts/index.md` — public command catalog

## Key Rules


<!-- wave:auto-guru begin — generated by render_agent_surfaces.py; do not edit -->
- Code and documentation Q&A: follow **Codebase and documentation questions (auto-Guru)** in `AGENTS.md` and `docs/agents/guru.md`; use Wavefoundry MCP (`code_ask`, `docs_search`) when attached; do not answer from memory alone.
<!-- wave:auto-guru end -->
<!-- wave:auto-guru end -->
- Stage gate before any code edit: change doc → wave admission → Prepare wave
- Never commit without explicit operator instruction in the current session
- Seed protection: do not edit `framework/seeds/` without `seed_edit_allowed` guard approval
